summary: Improves how Planban opens boards in the Codex in-app browser.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: This release helps /pb and /planban put the selected Planban board in front of you more consistently inside Codex.
